mapper.sql: MENU_NUMB , SUBX_NUMB , MENU_NAME , MENU_URLX , READ_AUTH , WRIT_AUTH , DELT_AUTH , SORT_ORDR , USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , REGI_DATE , UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , UPDT_DATE
mapper.select: /*getMenuList*/ SELECT M.MENU_NUMB , M.SUBX_NUMB , M.MENU_NAME , M.MENU_URLX , M.READ_AUTH , M.WRIT_AUTH , M.DELT_AUTH , M.SORT_ORDR , M.USEE_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{commYsno}, M.USEE_YSNO, #{useeYsnoCode}) AS USEE_YSNO_NAME , M.REGI_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(M.REGI_ADMN) AS REGI_ADMN_NAME , M.REGI_DATE , M.UPDT_ADMN , FN_GET_ADMIN_NAME(M.UPDT_ADMN) AS UPDT_ADMN_NAME , M.UPDT_DATE FROM TM_MENUXM M LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD R ON R.COMM_CODE = #{authCode} AND R.COMD_CODE = M.READ_AUTH AND NVL(R.USEE_YSNO, #{yes}) = #{yes} WHERE NVL(M.USEE_YSNO, #{yes}) = #{yes} AND (M.READ_AUTH IS NULL OR R.SORT_ORDER <= #{authLevel}) ORDER BY NVL(M.SORT_ORDR, 9999)
/*getMenuMngList*/ SELECT FROM TM_MENUXM ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999) DESC
